description: Disabilities affecting vision, from partial sight loss to complete blindness.

subTypes.label: Low Vision
subTypes.description: Partial sight that cannot be fully corrected with glasses or contact lenses.

subTypes.label: Colour Blindness
subTypes.description: Difficulty distinguishing certain colours (most commonly red and green).

subTypes.label: Blind
subTypes.description: No functional vision. Typically uses a screen reader and/or braille display.

subTypes.label: Light Sensitivity
subTypes.description: Difficulty with bright screens or environments. Requires reduced contrast or dark mode.

description: Disabilities affecting hearing, from partial hearing loss to complete deafness.

subTypes.label: Hard of Hearing
subTypes.description: Partial hearing loss. May use hearing aids or prefer written communication.

subTypes.label: Deaf
subTypes.description: No functional hearing. Communicates via sign language, lip reading, or text.

subTypes.label: Tinnitus
subTypes.description: Persistent ringing in the ears. May affect concentration in noisy environments.

subTypes.label: Auditory Processing Disorder
subTypes.description: Difficulty processing spoken language despite normal hearing sensitivity.

description: Disabilities affecting physical movement, dexterity, or mobility.

subTypes.label: Limited Hand Mobility
subTypes.description: Difficulty with fine motor tasks like typing. May use voice input or adapted keyboards.

subTypes.label: Wheelchair User
subTypes.description: Requires wheelchair for mobility. May need accessible workspaces and routes.

subTypes.label: Tremors
subTypes.description: Involuntary shaking affecting hands or limbs. May impact precision tasks.

subTypes.label: Hemiplegia / One-sided Paralysis
subTypes.description: Paralysis or weakness on one side. One-handed keyboard use is common.

subTypes.label: Chronic Pain / Fatigue
subTypes.description: Conditions like fibromyalgia or MS causing pain or energy limitations.

description: Disabilities affecting memory, concentration, learning, or information processing.

subTypes.label: ADHD
subTypes.description: Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder. Affects focus and impulse regulation.

subTypes.label: Dyslexia
subTypes.description: Difficulty with reading and spelling. Processing written text may take longer.

subTypes.label: Autism Spectrum
subTypes.description: May affect social communication and sensory processing. Often excels at pattern recognition.

subTypes.label: Memory Impairment
subTypes.description: Difficulty retaining information. Benefits from written instructions and reminders.

subTypes.label: Anxiety Disorder
subTypes.description: Severe anxiety that may affect performance in high-pressure environments.

subTypes.label: Dyscalculia
subTypes.description: Difficulty with numbers and mathematical concepts.
